summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Prototype-OA chatbot. All backend APIs and frontend features are working correctly. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%). Frontend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). OpenRouter integration with owl-alpha model is functioning properly with both streaming and non-streaming modes.
passed_tests: Backend: Health check returns status and model info
Backend: Create conversation endpoint works
Backend: List conversations sorted by updated_at desc
Backend: Get conversation by ID returns conversation and messages
Backend: Get conversation with invalid ID returns 404
Backend: Rename conversation updates title
Backend: Chat non-streaming creates conversation and auto-generates title
Backend: Chat streaming returns SSE events (meta, token, done)
Backend: Conversation history context is maintained across messages
Backend: Delete conversation removes conversation and messages
Frontend: Empty state renders with OA logo and 4 suggestions
Frontend: Model badge 'OWL ALPHA' visible in topbar
Frontend: Sidebar displays conversations with new chat button
Frontend: Clicking suggestion sends message and streams response
Frontend: Stop button visible and functional during streaming
Frontend: Conversations appear in sidebar after creation
Frontend: Composer Enter key sends message
Frontend: Composer Shift+Enter creates newline
Frontend: Copy button on assistant messages works
Frontend: Conversation switching updates URL and loads messages
Frontend: Rename conversation works (requires hover)
Frontend: Delete conversation works (requires hover)
Frontend: New chat button resets to empty state
